# Tordar Tømmervik — Personal Portfolio
> Full-stack developer based in Oslo, Norway. Specialises in React, Next.js, and TypeScript.

## About
Tordar Tømmervik is a full-stack developer with experience at Norwegian Red Cross (maintaining the IFRC Nyss disease surveillance platform, deployed across Africa, Central Asia, and the Pacific) and digital product consultancy Umain. Largely self-taught, starting with Python in 2020 to complement a degree in international relations. Currently building React/Next.js applications for enterprise clients at Umain.

## Projects

### Professional
- **Nyss** — Real-time disease surveillance platform for IFRC/Norwegian Red Cross. Deployed in 20+ countries across Africa, Central Asia, and the Pacific. Built with React, C#/.NET, and Azure.
- **Fidem** — Financial technology platform. Built with React, Next.js, and TypeScript.

### Personal
- **Pulse** — Spotify listening statistics dashboard. Visualises top tracks, albums, and artists. (pulse.tordar.no)
- **Strava Visualiser** — Personal fitness and activity data dashboard. (strava.tordar.no)
- **Photography Portfolio** — Travel and street photography gallery. (gallery.tordar.no)
- **EV Curator** — Electric vehicle test data intelligence dashboard. Aggregates and visualises EV review data.
- **ezBookkeeping** — Personal finance and bookkeeping tool integration.
- **Meal Planner** — Weekly meal planning application. (mealplanner.tordar.no)

### Open Source
- Portfolio source code available on GitHub (github.com/tordar)

## Skills
React, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, Tailwind CSS, Python, MongoDB, Azure, Vercel, C#/.NET, Go, PostgreSQL
